channel.title: Softwares on KHTDR.com
channel.description: Recent content in Softwares on KHTDR.com

item.title: pageboy
item.description: The full source code and examples are available at: khtdr/pageboy pageboy Write your shell scripts in any combination of scripting languages. Example Script example.pb #!/usr/bin/env pageboy echo in Bash $PAGE php echo back to Bash #!/usr/bin/env php <?php echo "in PHP\n"; Running the following, produces: chmod +x ./example.pb ./example.pb in Bash in PHP back to Bash You can mix and match all you want. If your script uses valid shebangs, it will work.

item.title: treeify-paths
item.description: The full source code and examples are available at: khtdr/treeify-paths Introduction Useful when converting a list of file names into a nested UL/LI tree. Nice for site maps, etc. Provide a list of file names: blog/all.html blog/2036/overflows.html And recieve a directory-like tree: blog all.html 2036 overflows.html Installation Install it with NPM: npm install --save treeify-paths import treeifyPaths from 'treeify-paths'; If you are not using NPM, install the library by downloading the source file and including it in your project:

item.title: react-zondicons
item.description: A dependency-free, small, fast, good-looking React SVG icon set. See: http://khtdr.com/react-zondicons/ for installation, usage, documentation, and examples.

item.title: opts.js
item.description: You can find the source code and all examples at Github, github.com/khtdr/opts. Introduction to Opts.js Why choose opts.js over something bigger and better? Small : Under 10kb, uncompressed. Stable : Relatively unchanged since 2010. See changelog. Standalone : No package manager necessary, no compiling needed. See src/opts.js. Tested : Over 5 million downloads. See npm/opts. Quick-Start example The following example set up a custom "version" function, and opts in to the automatic help message.
